# SplanAI

> SplanAI is an AI pre-sale proposal tool for small US home builders. It turns a lot (address, size, budget) into 3 buyer-ready home concept proposals in about 30 seconds — concept directions, a price range, and a monthly-payment view — delivered as a shareable client portal and a branded PDF. The concepts are for pre-sale conversations, not permit-ready plans.

SplanAI is built for owner-operator custom and semi-custom builders (most US home-builder firms have fewer than 10 employees) who compete against national builders' polished presentations without an in-house designer or marketing team.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://splanai.com/): What SplanAI does, how proposal generation works, and plans.
- [Blog](https://splanai.com/blog): Practical articles for home builders on pre-sale proposals, buyer communication, and running a small building business. New articles are listed in the sitemap.
- [Sitemap](https://splanai.com/sitemap.xml): Full list of published pages and blog articles.
